channel.title: Important-Infoes on Bachs
channel.description: Recent content in Important-Infoes on Bachs

item.title: Tuition
item.description:
Tuition

Tuition fees are listed below and are based on the assigned group that your child is placed in.

Each student will be need to pay a tuition fee each semester. All tuition fees are due on or before October 1 and February 1.

Trebel Choir - $45

Concert Choir - $65

For families with multiple children, we will discount the tuition for their assigned choir/grade by $10 for each additional child.

item.title: 2025 2026 Schedule
item.description:
Fall 2025 Rehearsals (Wednesdays)

Sept. 10, Sept. 24 Oct. 8, Oct. 22, Oct. 29 Nov. 12, Nov. 19 Dec 12. Friday Concert

Spring 2026 Rehearsals (Wednesdays)

Jan. 28 Feb. 11, Feb. 25 Mar. 11, Mar. 25 Apr. 8, Apr. 22, Apr. 29 May 13, May 15 Friday Concert

item.title: Registration
item.description:
Registration

  • Opens in the fall of each year and closes on the first rehearsal in November of the first semester.

  • A registration fee of $25 per family (the fee is required for each school year) is payable at the time of registration and is non-refundable.

  • Fill out the registration form.

  • IMPORTANT If your student would like to be part of the Concert Choir, they must audition. Please sign-up for this years auditions by August.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Contact Us!

The Primary means of communications for BACHS is e-mail. During the registration process, you will be asked to provide a vaild e-mail address for use by the director(s).

Email: Admin@BACHSchoir.com

If you have questions, you may contact the choir director at: jeff.miller@bachschoir.com

You may also contact us as follows:

U.S. Mail

BACHS Choir

P. O. Box 784

Bloomington, IL 61702-0784
